command:
sudo bash -c "fuser -k 3006/tcp 2>/dev/null; nohup python3 -m http.server 3006 --directory /home/$(whoami)/micky_project > /home/$(whoami)/micky_project/server.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; cat << 'EOF' > /etc/traefik/dynamic/micky_beta.toml
[http.routers.micky-beta-router]
  rule = \"Host(\`micky.eu.org\`) && PathPrefix(\`/beta\`)\"
  service = \"micky-beta-service\"
  middlewares = [\"micky-stripprefix\"]

[http.middlewares.micky-stripprefix.stripPrefix]
  prefixes = [\"/beta\"]

[http.services.micky-beta-service.loadBalancer]
  [[http.services.micky-beta-service.loadBalancer.servers]]
    url = \"http://127.0.0.1:3006\"
EOF
" && echo "[RECOVERY_SUCCESS] Server revived on 3006 with StripPrefix middleware."
